Tests for billing and Stripe webhook handling.
Create a user with active subscription.
Standard user should not get beta discount.
Annual plans should be cheaper per month than monthly.
Free tier should have base limits.
Pro tier should have higher limits than free.
Subscription update should upgrade user plan.
Subscription deletion should downgrade to free tier.
Checkout completion should update plan from metadata.
Tests for credit pack purchase handling.
Backtest credit pack should add 50 credits.
Strategy slots pack should add 5 slots.
Duplicate webhook should not add credits twice.
Unknown pack type should be logged but not error.
Tests for webhook event idempotency tracking.
Processed webhook should be recorded in database.
Tests for authentication and security functions.
Tests for password hashing and verification.
Hash should be a valid bcrypt hash starting with $2b$.
Same password should produce different hashes (different salts).
Empty password should fail verification against non-empty hash.
Unicode characters in password should be handled correctly.
Tests for JWT token creation and validation.
Token should be a non-empty string.
Valid token should decode to correct user ID.
Different users should get different tokens.
Tests for password reset token generation and validation.
Reset token should be a non-empty string.
Each generated token should be unique.
Reset token should be URL-safe (no special URL characters).
Valid token within expiry should return True.
User with no stored token should return False.
Should handle naive datetime (no timezone) correctly.
Create an in-memory SQLite engine for testing.
Create a new database session for a test.
Create sample OHLCV candles for testing.
Create candles with a clear uptrend for testing.
Create candles with a clear downtrend for testing.
Tests for backtest API permission gating.
Create test client with database session override.
SMA should return None for warmup period.
SMA with period=1 should return the values themselves.
SMA of empty list should return empty list.
SMA should return None if window contains None.
First EMA value should equal SMA of first period values.
EMA should return None for warmup period.
EMA should react to price changes with exponential weight.
EMA of empty list should return empty list.
RSI should be 100 when all changes are positive.
RSI should be 0 when all changes are negative.
RSI should return None for warmup period.
RSI should always be between 0 and 100.
RSI of list shorter than 2 should return all None.
MACD should return macd_line, signal_line, histogram.
MACD line should have None values during EMA warmup.
MACD line should equal fast EMA minus slow EMA.
Histogram should equal MACD line minus signal line.
Bollinger should return upper, middle, lower bands.
With constant price, bands should converge to middle (std=0).
Upper band should always be >= lower band.
ATR should calculate correct true range average.
ATR should return None for warmup period.
First ATR value should be simple average of true ranges.
ATR of list shorter than 2 should return all None.
Edge case tests for all indicators.
All indicators should handle empty input gracefully.
Indicators with period > data length should return all None.
Stochastic should have None values during warmup.
Stochastic values should be between 0 and 100.
Stochastic should handle flat prices (no range).
ADX should have None values during warmup.
ADX should show directional movement in uptrend.
Ichimoku lines should have appropriate warmup.
OBV should accumulate volume based on price direction.
OBV should increase when all prices rise.
Fibonacci should have None during warmup.
Fibonacci levels should be ordered correctly.
Fibonacci should calculate correct retracement values.
Fibonacci should handle flat prices (no range).
Price variation should calculate correct percentage.
Price variation should return negative for price drops.
Price variation should handle zero previous close.
Price variation should handle None values.
Price variation should return 0% for no change.
Tests for structured logging and correlation ID propagation.
Helper: emit a log via log_func and return parsed JSON from stdout.
Logs emitted after setup_logging() are valid JSON with expected fields.
Correlation ID from ContextVar appears in log output.
When ContextVar is empty, correlation_id is absent from logs.
Extra kwargs passed to logger appear as top-level JSON fields.
logger.exception() produces JSON with a traceback field.
Integration tests for the correlation ID middleware.
Request without X-Correlation-ID header gets a generated one in logs.
Request with X-Correlation-ID header propagates it.
Verify structlog contextvars appear in logs and can be cleaned up.
Tests for backtest narrative summary generation.
Factory for BacktestSummary with sensible defaults.
Drawdown is expressed as a percentage from peak equity.
Zero drawdown should not produce odd text.
Alpha near zero should use 'on par' language.
If narrative generation throws, return fallback.
Tests for the backtest simulation engine.
Helper to create a candle for testing.
Helper to create strategy signals for testing.
Backtest with no candles should return zero trades.
Backtest with no entry signals should have no trades.
Single trade with price increase should be profitable.
Single trade with price decrease should be unprofitable.
Tests for fee, slippage, and spread calculations.
Slippage should worsen entry and exit prices.
Total costs should equal sum of fees + slippage + spread.
Tests for exit condition priority (SL > Trailing > MaxDD > Time > Signal > TP).
Stop loss should trigger even if TP level would also be hit.
Trailing stop should trigger on reversal after new high.
Time exit should close position after specified bars.
Max drawdown exit should trigger when trade DD exceeds threshold.
Tests for partial take profit exits.
Single TP level with 100% should close entire position.
Multiple TP levels should create partial closes.
MFE should track the best price during trade.
MAE should track the worst price during trade.
R-multiple should be PnL / initial risk.
R-multiple should be None if no stop loss defined.
Sharpe ratio should be positive for consistently profitable strategy.
Sortino should be >= Sharpe when downside volatility is low.
Calmar ratio should equal CAGR / max drawdown.
Max consecutive losses should track longest losing streak.
Benchmark should track buy-and-hold from first open.
Alpha should be strategy return minus benchmark return.
Edge case tests for the backtest engine.
Open position at end should close with end_of_data reason.
Entry signal on last candle should not create trade.
Entry and exit on same candle should be prevented.
Position size should be percentage of equity.
Tests for strategy interpreter signal wiring and evaluation.
Create candles with monotonically decreasing closes (RSI approaches 0).
Test connection map building with legacy format.
Test input label generation for indicator blocks.
Test input label generation for price blocks.
Test condition label generation for compare blocks.
Test condition label generation for crossover blocks.
Test condition extraction for simple strategy.
Test condition extraction with AND logic.
Test exit explanation for all exit reason types.
Only conditions that are true at entry should be listed for OR logic.
AND logic should keep every branch that validated the entry.
Entry explanation should use the signal candle (i), not execution candle (i+1).
Create test client with database session override.
Create an existing user for login tests.
Valid signup should create user and return token.
Signup with existing email should fail.
Signup with invalid email format should fail.
Signup with too short password should fail.
Login with nonexistent email should return 401.
Login response should include user tier information.
Authenticated request should return user data.
Request with invalid token should return 401.
Password reset request should succeed for existing user.
Password reset for nonexistent email should still return 200.
Password reset with invalid token should fail.
